CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-13-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BLUE SKY FOREVER's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment

Granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)
